error_signature: n8n version is still running on 1.119.2
title: Docker installation not updating n8n version
symptom: After pulling new versions of n8n and launching the container, the logs indicate that n8n is still running version 1.119.2.
applies_when: Attempting to update to a newer version
not_this_if: Docker container is correctly running the latest version after build
root_cause: The Dockerfile may not be updated to reference the latest n8n image, causing the build to use an outdated version. Additionally, the image tag used during the build process may not reflect the intended version.
fix_steps: Update the Dockerfile to use the correct n8n image tag
Build the Docker image with the command 'docker build -t n8n-curl:latest .'
Run 'docker compose up -d' to start the updated container
Check the logs to confirm the version is updated
agent_instruction: Update the Dockerfile and rebuild the n8n image with the latest tag.
